Radiation below the knee suggests lumbar spine origin — redirect to lumbar pathway.

conditions.name: Avascular Necrosis

questions.questionText: Do you experience pain at rest?
questions.question: Do you experience pain at rest?

effects.redFlagText: Rest pain — strong AVN indicator; urgent imaging advised.
Rest pain — strong AVN indicator; urgent imaging advised.

questions.questionText: How have your symptoms progressed?
questions.question: How have your symptoms progressed?

options.value: Rapid worsening over weeks to months

effects.notes: Slow progression favours OA over AVN.

answers.value: Rapid worsening over weeks to months

effects.notes: Slow progression favours OA over AVN.

questions.questionText: Is your walking tolerance reduced?
questions.question: Is your walking tolerance reduced?

conditions.clinical_note: AVN is imaging-dependent: MRI is definitive for early disease. Use red flags (rest pain, risk factors) to prioritize urgent imaging.
